title: Grievance G-2026-01: District Position Elimination
body: BEU Eastbridge filing against the elimination of two History department positions at Eastbridge High School. Filed April 8, 2026.

title: Contract Fight 2027 - Chapter Timeline
body: Key dates for the BEU Eastbridge contract campaign. Contract expires February 26, 2027. Bargaining begins October 2026.

title: AP US History - Period 1 Lesson Plan (1491-1607)
body: Lesson plan covering indigenous civilizations, Columbian Exchange, and early European contact. Includes primary source document analysis and discussion.

title: Labor History Pilot Unit - Introduction and Rationale
body: Curriculum pilot for October 2026: labor history unit covering Triangle Shirtwaist, Pullman Strike, and contemporary labor movements. Pending department approval.

title: BEU March Rally - Talking Points for Members
body: Key talking points for the March 19 City Hall rally: position cuts, contract demands, class size, and healthcare. Distribute to chapter members before arrival.

title: AP US History DBQ Rubric 2026 Update
body: Updated DBQ rubric aligned with College Board May 2026 scoring guidelines. Shared with all five AP sections.

title: Eastbridge High School - BEU Building Rep Report Q1 2026
body: Quarterly report covering member issues, grievance status, recruitment updates, and contract fight participation for Q1 2026.

title: Primary Source Set: Pullman Strike 1894
body: Collection of primary sources for Pullman Strike unit including worker testimonies, newspaper accounts, and George Pullman company statements.

title: Lexington and Concord Field Trip - Nov 7 2026 Plan
body: Day trip itinerary: depart 7:30AM, Battle Green 9:00AM, North Bridge 10:30AM, Concord Museum 12:00PM, return 3:30PM. Two buses confirmed.

title: Open Letter to BPS School Committee - History Cuts
body: Signed by 442 community members and 38 faculty, delivered May 28, 2026. Demands reinstatement of both eliminated history positions.

title: PSLF Employment Certification - Year 7 (2025-26)
body: Public Service Loan Forgiveness employment certification submitted December 2025. Employer: Boston Public Schools, 7 qualifying years completed.

title: World History 10 - Civil Rights Unit Overview
body: Six-week unit covering from Reconstruction through the Civil Rights Movement. Includes primary sources, film analysis, and student research project.

title: BEU Eastbridge Chapter Meeting Notes - May 28 2026
body: Attendance: 38 members. Topics: grievance update, contract timeline, summer organizing workshop planning, legal fund update.

title: AP US History Period 8 Lecture Notes - Cold War
body: Lecture notes covering containment policy, Korean War, McCarthyism, and the Cuban Missile Crisis. Includes timeline and document analysis activity.

title: Dorchester Community Center Basketball Roster 2025-26
body: The Historians roster for Thursday evening league. Players: David Russo, Marcus Hill, Kevin OBrien, Greg Sullivan, James Whitfield, Anthony Russo plus six others.

title: Strava Training Log - Spring 2026 Running Plan
body: Monday Wednesday Saturday runs, targeting 5K in under 26 minutes by October 2026. Current pace averaging 27:45 per 3.1 miles.

title: BEU Legal Fund Appeal Letter - May 2026
body: Appeal letter for legal fund to support contract fight litigation. Sent to 448 chapter members. Goal: $5,000. Current raised: $3,200.

title: AP Exam Review Sessions Schedule - April-May 2026
body: Tuesday 3:15PM after-school sessions in Room 204. Topics rotating through all periods. May 2 full practice exam. May 15 final review.

title: Blood Pressure Log - Dr. Callahan Follow-Up
body: Monthly BP readings for lisinopril dosage review. April: 128/82. May: 131/84. Follow-up appointment scheduled June 25, 2026.

title: Florida Trip Planning - December 22-29 2026
body: Jacksonville trip to visit Grandma Carol and Louise Russo. Flight options reviewed, hotels near Magnolia Ave. Budget estimate: $820 for two.
